Welcome to PaintWorkz Pro

🏢 Your Business

You're all set!

Your business details are saved. You can now create your first job from the Measure tab.

THICK ?Board thickness in mm. Default 18mm. Used on the shop label and supply docket to identify the substrate.
PROFILE ?Door/panel profile type — Plain, Shaker, J-Mould etc. Links to your Price Matrix. Manage profiles in Admin → Database.
QTY ?Number of identical parts. SQM and price multiply by this.

CUT TO SIZE - Edge Routing ?Select an edge routing type to add a per-lineal-metre charge to CTS parts. Edge types and rates are set in Admin → Price Matrix → Cut To Size.

Paint Formula

MULTIPLE FORMULAS FOUND — SELECT ONE:
COLOUR
-
CODE
-
ℹ️ The right litre size is selected automatically when you print the mixing card

Door Profiles ?The profile types your shop works with — Plain, Shaker, J-Mould, Handleless etc. Each profile links to a row in your Price Matrix. Add a profile here and it appears in the measure sheet dropdown.

Add new profiles or edit existing names. Profiles are used in your pricing matrix tiers.

Paint Formula Database ?Store the full tinter formula for each paint colour — base code, tinter codes and gram amounts. When you enter a matching colour on a job, tap the colour field to instantly pull up the formula and scale it to your required litres.

Manage your paint formulas. When you type a colour in the Measure tab, matching formulas will appear automatically.

Add New Formula
BASE COLOR (e.g., White, Clear, Green)
BASE CODES
CODE
GRAMS
ALT CODE
FROM (L)
ALT GRAMS
Alt Code + From (L) + Alt Grams optional — tip: Alt Grams = 1L grams × litres needed.
TINTERS
CODE
GRAMS
ALT CODE
FROM (L)
ALT GRAMS
Code + Grams required. Alt Code + From (litres) optional — if the job needs ≥ that many litres, the alt code is used on the mixing card instead.
Existing Formulas (0)
Tip: search a tinter code like ITE2003 to find which formulas have typos

Live stock levels. Updated automatically when jobs complete. Tap + Receive Stock when a delivery arrives.

Generate Form

Supply Docket ?A detailed part list showing every door, panel and drawer with dimensions, finish and paint colour. Give to your paint supplier or use as a job checklist.

Part list for client

Estimate ?A detailed cost breakdown grouped by colour — shows every door/panel with SQM, price per m² and totals. Use for internal costing or as a preliminary quote.

Job breakdown only

Mixing Card ?The tinter formula card for your spray booth. Shows base code, tinter amounts and quantities to mix. Hand to your paint technician before spraying.

Paint shop formula

Quote Form ?A formal quote showing the job breakdown and your pricing. Includes raw door cost vs 2Pac painting cost columns. Suitable to send directly to the client.

Raw vs Paint pricing

🎨 Paint Order

Manufacturing order form

Invoice ?A professional tax invoice with your ABN, company details and full job breakdown. Ready to send to the client for payment.

Dynamic length billing

🏷️ Shop Label ?A compact label to stick on the job in your spray booth. Shows job number, client, colour, finish and a QR code. Scan the QR on any phone to pull up the full job.

Print & post on job

📋 Cover Sheet ?A one-page job summary with client details, job info, colour and key dimensions. Clips to the front of a job folder.

Job info summary

📅 A3 Schedule

Work schedule view

📦 Batch Print ?Select multiple PDF types and print them all at once — useful for generating estimate, label and supply docket together in one go.

Select & print multiple

CHARGES HISTORY
Charges auto-apply to next Estimate / Quote / Invoice generated for this job.

Job History

Save your current job using the 💾 button above to add it to history

🔔 Global Notifications ?Jobs that are overdue or nearing their deadline appear here as alerts. Set how many days each phase takes in the job timeline editor (tap ✏️ Edit on any job row in the chart below).

0

No notifications yet

Jobs Chart ?A Gantt-style timeline showing all active jobs across the month. Each bar spans the job phases — Measure, Sand 1, Undercoat, Sand 2, Inspect, Topcoat, Complete. Scroll horizontally to see other months.

← Scroll horizontally to view different months →

📐
MEASURE TAB DEFAULTS

Set default values for new parts in the Measure tab. ?These pre-fill every new part — profile type, paint mode, finish and thickness. Saves time when most of your jobs use the same setup.

🌍
GLOBAL SETTINGS ?Units, decimal precision, tooltips toggle, language/spelling, theme, and staff PIN settings. These apply across the whole app.

Configure global app settings for measurements, precision, and AI features

Fixed flat rate for colour match surcharge

Hover over ? icons to see explanations

Changes spelling throughout the app. Auto-detected from your device.

Dark mode follows your iOS/Android system setting by default.

🎨
PAINT SETTINGS

🎨 Paint Brands ?Add the paint brands you use — Dulux, Wattyl, Evic etc. The selected brand auto-populates on new jobs. You can switch brand per-job in the Measure tab.

Configure available paint brands for your region (e.g., Dulux, Wattyl for Australia; Benjamin Moore, Sherwin-Williams for USA)

Available Brands:

🎨 Paint Supplier / Mixing Card Labels

Controls the supplier name and formula code labels printed on mixing cards. Evic ExpressTint is pre-configured. Select Custom to enter your own supplier's labels.

✅ Evic ExpressTint — default labels active:
Section header: TINT FORMULA - EVIC DETAILS
Formula code label: Evic Code:
To use a different supplier, select Custom / Other Supplier above.

Shown in mixing card header

Replaces "Evic Code:" on mixing card

Printed as the bold header on the mixing card formula section

TINT FORMULA — BC DETAILS
(Weights for 1 Litre of Paint)

🔒
Pro Feature
Paint coverage rate tracking requires the Pro plan.

🪣 Paint Coverage Rates ?How many m² one litre of paint covers. Satin/Gloss ~5 m²/L, Undercoat ~8 m²/L. Used to calculate litres needed and paint base cost per job.

Set sqm per litre for each product type. Used in Reports tab to calculate litre quantities.

📦 Paint Stock Settings

Set stock alert thresholds and paint base costs for Reports profitability analysis.

Alert triggers when any base drops below this level
🔒
Pro Feature
Paint cost analysis requires the Pro plan.

Enter your cost per litre for each base. The Reports tab calculates litres used from your job SQM ÷ coverage rate — these $/L figures are then multiplied to get total paint cost. Tinter grams in your formulas are separate and not used here.

⚪ Satin
✨ Gloss
🪨 Matt
🔷 Clear
🪣 Undercoat (coloured)
🏢
COMPANY DETAILS (PDF HEADER) ?Your business name, ABN, address, phone and logo. These auto-fill onto every PDF — estimate, quote, invoice and supply docket.

Update your company information displayed on all PDF forms (Estimates, Quotes, Invoices, Supply Dockets)

Upload a PNG file for your circle logo (recommended size: 150x150px)

☁️ Logo Sync: Logos are saved to your cloud account and will appear automatically on all devices.

Upload a PNG file for your header/branding logo (recommended size: 1024x300px or similar aspect ratio)

Third-party integrations for accounting and external services

Get a key at console.anthropic.com

⚠️ If you get quota errors: Go to Google Cloud Console → enable billing on your project. Gemini free tier is very limited without billing (even $0 spend — just needs a card linked).
💰
ADDITIONAL CHARGES ?Set delivery, freight, colour surcharges and GST rate. These are applied automatically when generating estimates, quotes and invoices.

Configure door colour multipliers and delivery region charges. ?Set the % surcharge for Standard, Light, Dark and Extra Tint colours. Also set delivery region flat fees and clear coat rates — these all appear in the charges popup before generating any PDF.

Door Colour Multipliers (% of paint price)
Delivery/Pickup Regions ($)

Set your delivery zones and charges. These appear as options when generating estimates.

Other Settings
📅
GANTT CHART TIMELINE ?Set default phase durations for the schedule view — how many days each stage (measure, spray, topcoat etc) takes. Applied to new jobs automatically.

Configure default timeline durations for each job phase. ?Set the default number of days for Measure, Sand 1, Undercoat, Sand 2, Inspect, Topcoat and Complete. Applies to every new job — override per-job by tapping Edit on any row in the Schedule tab.

Pro Feature
Staff account management requires the Pro plan.
👷
STAFF ACCOUNTS ?Create accounts for shop floor staff. They log in with email + 4-digit PIN and can view jobs, history and labels — but not pricing, estimates or admin.

Create accounts for shop staff. They can log in with email + 4-digit PIN to view jobs, history, database, supply docket, mixing cards, and labels — but not admin, pricing, estimates, quotes or invoices.

🔒
Pro Feature
Data backup & restore requires the Pro plan.
💾
DATA BACKUP & RESTORE
LAST MANUAL BACKUP
No backup yet this session
📥 Download Full Backup

Captures all job history, clients, paint formulas, pricing, settings and company details into a single dated JSON file. Save to your external 5TB drive.

📤 Restore From Backup

Select a .json backup file. Warning: overwrites current data. A safety backup downloads automatically first.

🤖 Automated Overnight Backups

The companion script paintworkz-backup.js runs nightly on Windows/Mac, connects to Firebase, and saves 30-day rotating backups to your external 5TB drive. No browser needed.

Full setup instructions are included inside the script file.

TERMS OF SERVICE & LEGAL
PaintWorkz Pro — Terms of Service
Last updated: 4 March 2026

1. Acceptance
By accessing or using PaintWorkz Pro you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the App.

2. Ownership & Intellectual Property
PaintWorkz Pro is created and owned by Colin Bedford. All code, design, and content is the intellectual property of Colin Bedford. Unauthorised copying, reverse engineering, or redistribution is strictly prohibited.

3. Licence
A non-exclusive, non-transferable licence is granted to use the App solely for managing your painting business. This does not permit resale, sub-licensing, or redistribution of the App itself.

4. Data & Privacy
Your data is stored in your Firebase account and local device storage. The Owner does not access, sell, or share your business data. You are responsible for maintaining backups.

5. Disclaimer of Warranties
The App is provided "as is" without warranty. No guarantees are made regarding uptime, data retention, or fitness for purpose. Use at your own risk.

6. Limitation of Liability
To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Owner is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages including data loss, business interruption, or financial loss.

7. Subscription & Payment
Where a subscription applies, access is contingent on current payment. Pricing may be modified with 30 days notice.

8. Termination
The Owner may suspend or terminate access at any time for breach of these Terms.

9. Governing Law
These Terms are governed by the laws of Victoria, Australia.

10. Contact
[email protected]

Privacy Policy (Summary)
We collect your email address for login and business data you enter (stored in Firebase under your account). We do not sell your data. Firebase (Google) is used for auth and storage. You may request deletion of your account at any time by contacting us.
🐛
BUG REPORTS & FEEDBACK ?Found a bug or have a feature idea? Send it directly to support. Include your device type and what you were doing when it happened.

Found a bug or have a feature request? Send us a message and we'll get onto it.

🐛 Bug Report 💡 Feature Request

Include your device type and what you were doing when the issue occurred. Screenshots welcome.
